top_signals.title: Amazon scraps AI leaderboard to stop workers chasing usage scores
top_signals.summary: Senior executive Dave Treadwell tells staff ‘don’t use AI just for the sake of using AI’ as costs rise
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Dell shares jump 27% after server maker reports fastest sales growth since return to public market in 2018
top_signals.summary: Dell has gone from being a sleepy legacy tech company to a high-growth AI story, assembling servers packed with graphics processing units.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Okta jumps 14%, tops first-quarter results on agentic AI demand
top_signals.summary: CEO Todd McKinnon said Okta is "playing a long game" on AI and is allocating more resources to agentic tools.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
